name: VOD To Plex
description: Dispatcharr plugin that bridges VOD movies into Plex via rclone HTTP mount with 302 redirect streaming, web dashboard, and selective activation.
author: knmplace

fields.label: Dispatcharr
fields.description: Connection to Dispatcharr for VOD proxy streaming.

fields.label: Dispatcharr URL
fields.help_text: Full URL of Dispatcharr reachable by Plex (LAN IP, not localhost). Used for 302 redirect playback. Use 127.0.0.1 if running on same host.

fields.label: HTTP Server
fields.description: The plugin runs its own HTTP server for the dashboard UI and rclone/Plex streaming endpoint.

fields.label: Dashboard / Streaming Port
fields.help_text: Port for the web dashboard and VOD streaming endpoint. Must be exposed in Docker.

fields.label: Dashboard Host IP
fields.help_text: LAN IP of the Docker host (not the container). Used for dashboard URL and STRM file URLs.

fields.label: Plex Integration
fields.description: Connect to your Plex server to manage the VOD library and monitor playback.

fields.label: Plex URL
fields.help_text: Full URL of your Plex server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:32400)

fields.label: Plex Token
fields.help_text: X-Plex-Token for authenticating with Plex API

fields.label: Plex Library Section ID
fields.help_text: The Plex library section number for VOD movies (find via Plex API /library/sections)

fields.label: STRM Files
fields.description: Configure where STRM and NFO files are written for Plex to discover.

fields.label: STRM Output Directory
fields.help_text: Directory where .strm and .nfo files are written. Should be accessible to Plex via rclone mount or shared volume.

fields.label: Streaming
fields.description: Playback uses 302 redirect to Dispatcharr's native VOD proxy. No streaming configuration needed — Dispatcharr handles connections, Range requests, and session management.

actions.label: Open Dashboard
actions.description: Open the VOD To Plex web dashboard in a new tab.

actions.label: Start Server
actions.description: Start the HTTP server for the dashboard and streaming endpoint.

confirm.message: This will stop the dashboard and streaming endpoint. Active streams will be interrupted. Continue?

actions.label: Server Status
actions.description: Check the current status of the HTTP server.

actions.label: Generate STRM Files
actions.description: Generate .strm and .nfo files for all activated movies.

actions.label: Scan Plex Library
actions.description: Trigger a Plex library scan to pick up new STRM files.
